subcodes.first_line: Thou art He, O my God, Whose most beauteous names and most sublime likenesses are sanctified above the comprehension
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت الذی یا الهی تقدست اسمائک الحسنی و تنزهت امثالک العلیا عن ادراک عقول
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @limits of the intellect, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God
